success.description: You mask your own powers. Until the end of the encounter, your Grey Order magic becomes difficult to detect. Apart from a spell's function (such as the darkness caused by a spell to cause darkness), there is no obvious indication that you have cast a spell at all. Furthermore, you are not required to make gestures or chant mystic words to cast your spells and when you use the Channel Power action there is no obvious cue that you are holding magical power

sigmarsComet.description: Anyone using Magical Sight to see if you are a wizard must pass a Hard (3d) check to notice your magical aura until the end of the encounter
